global.headline: Boba, But Make It Functional
global.subline: Every scoop is loaded with real tea, natural sweeteners, and functional superfoods. No industrial sugar. No toxic creamers. No artificial anything. Just clean ingredients that taste incredible and actually support your body.

classic-milk-tea.ingredients: Whole-leaf Assam black tea (finely milled), organic date powder, coconut cream powder, oat milk powder, lion's mane mushroom extract, prebiotic chicory root fiber (inulin), Himalayan pink salt, vitamin D3, vitamin B12, zinc

keyIngredients.name: Assam Black Tea
keyIngredients.benefit: Rich in L-theanine for calm, focused energy without the jitters

keyIngredients.name: Organic Date Powder
keyIngredients.benefit: Natural sweetness with iron, potassium & fiber — no blood sugar spike

keyIngredients.name: Lion's Mane Extract
keyIngredients.benefit: Supports cognitive function, memory & mental clarity

keyIngredients.name: Prebiotic Chicory Fiber
keyIngredients.benefit: Feeds good gut bacteria — no bloating, better digestion
